notes: Adds consistent desktop and mobile panel padding plus a shared vertical-rhythm rule for every adjacent structural block on all expert tabs
Unifies control heights and action groups and guarantees 44-pixel mobile touch targets without horizontal overflow
Adds visible server-filter labels, clearer XRay and maintenance actions, accessible favourite controls and Russian health/profile wording
Retains the progressive expert Overview, bounded background loading and invalidation-aware API caches from 2026.07.15.1
Keeps both rollback tiers: the proven embedded 2026.07.14.2 release and a reversible previous-application backup; neither changes VPN configuration
Includes desktop/mobile browser checks plus BusyBox, cache-flow, safety, endpoint-scan and rollback regression checks
Does not change profile selection, XRay startup, Hysteria2, OAuth or routing logic
